protocol_rules.rule_1: No phase starts until previous phase audit JSON is received and approved by Chief Engineer.
protocol_rules.rule_2: No file is touched unless explicitly listed in scope of current phase.
protocol_rules.rule_3: NOT_TO_TOUCH files are immutable: apps/agent/mpesa_parser.py and apps/tg_bot/db.py.
protocol_rules.rule_4: Every phase ends with Antigravity issuing a completion JSON using the PHASE_COMPLETION_TEMPLATE.
protocol_rules.rule_5: No new features, no refactors, no improvements outside stated scope.
protocol_rules.rule_6: If a blocker is encountered, Antigravity issues a BLOCKER_REPORT JSON and stops. Chief Engineer resolves before work resumes.
protocol_rules.rule_7: Sample/fake data must not exist in any user-facing code path after Phase 1.
protocol_rules.rule_8: Before issuing any PHASE_COMPLETION JSON, Antigravity must complete the full 7-step healing cycle: (1) grep audit for removed items, (2) local bot start zero errors, (3) live Telegram test all touched commands, (4) live Telegram test minimum 3 untouched commands for regression, (5) fly deploy, (6) retest on live Fly.io deployment, (7) fly logs clean after deployment. PHASE_COMPLETION JSON must include: real git hash, grep output, fly logs last 20 lines, live Telegram timestamps, regression check results, explicit collateral damage statement.
